notes: Default hero body, readable top-down/three-quarter silhouette. Import as SpriteRenderer sprite, 128 PPU, pivot center-bottom.
Player hit feedback state. Same bounds as idle to avoid visual popping.
Player defeat/death visual. Keep silhouette simple; no gore detail needed.
Empty hero shell left in arena while possession is active. SpriteRenderer; must remain distinct from dead body.
Overlay showing player is controlling a vessel. Additive/overlay candidate; no baked enemy body.
Weak cultist enemy base. SpriteRenderer; leave outer silhouette clear for marker ring.
Weak cultist hit state. Same footprint as idle.
Weak cultist death state or last frame. Can be swapped before death puff VFX.
Fast fanatic enemy base. Silhouette must differ from weak cultist in greyscale.
Fast fanatic hit state. Same bounds as idle.
Fast fanatic death state or last frame. Can be paired with death puff VFX.
Ranged preacher enemy base. Keep blank papers free of letters or numbers.
Preacher hit state. Same footprint as idle.
Preacher death state or last frame. No readable ticket markings.
Mother Couponella boss base sprite. SpriteRenderer; pivot center-bottom; no readable coupon text.
Mother Couponella hit feedback. Match idle bounds as closely as possible.
Mother Couponella defeat sprite. Avoid gore; keep large readable silhouette.
Floor warning marker for boss AOE/tape attack. SpriteRenderer or UI world-space image; transparent center acceptable.
HP bar frame. Use as sliced UI Image; no numbers or labels.
HP fill art. Use as filled UI Image; avoid gradients that vanish on mobile.
Possession charge bar frame. Sliced UI Image; no possession button behavior.
Possession charge fill. Filled Image; use color/alpha animation in Unity.
Token currency icon. UI Image; text count added in Unity UI.
Room progress frame. Coder can place icons/filled states; no room numbers baked in.
Active/cleared room progress token. UI Image repeated by code for progress slots.
Optional indicator that auto-attack is active. UI Image only; not a button.
Optional inactive auto-attack indicator. UI Image only; no manual attack button.
Floating joystick base at rest. UI Image under touch area; no labels.
Floating joystick base while touched. UI Image; Coder changes alpha/position by touch.
Floating joystick knob at rest. UI Image; no text or numbers.
Floating joystick knob while dragged. UI Image; no dash or action affordance.
Ring showing valid marked vessel. Overlay SpriteRenderer; center must be transparent.
Marker that possession charge/proximity is ready. Not a button; use as feedback above/around vessel.
Active possession aura over controlled vessel. Overlay SpriteRenderer; can pulse via script.
Non-damaging default possession exit marker. Must not be used as explosion or damage indicator.
Sacred demonic slot machine body at rest. SpriteRenderer or UI Image; no readable labels; passive auto-roll presentation only.
Slot machine during automatic post-combat roll. State swap during auto-roll; no manual interaction prompt.
Reusable reel panel frame. UI Image; symbols layered separately.
Reel token symbol. UI Image/SpriteRenderer; no currency amount.
Reel candle symbol. UI Image/SpriteRenderer.
Reel seal symbol. UI Image/SpriteRenderer.
Reel eye symbol. UI Image/SpriteRenderer.
Standard reward card frame. UI Image; text and icon placed by Unity UI.
Selected reward card frame. UI Image state; no baked selection label.
Disabled/unavailable reward card frame. UI Image state; use for disabled card presentation only.
Reroll visual icon/button art. UI Button Image; no text count baked in.
Disabled reroll visual. UI Button disabled Image; reroll count in Unity text.
Standard reward icon placeholder 01. Placeholder; does not define mechanics.
Standard reward icon placeholder 02. Placeholder; does not define mechanics.
Standard reward icon for P03 Last Breath, the only possession-exit explosion source. Only icon tied to validated P03 explosion behavior.
Standard reward icon placeholder 04. Placeholder; does not define mechanics.
Standard reward icon placeholder 05. Placeholder; does not define mechanics.
Standard reward icon placeholder 06. Placeholder; does not define mechanics.
Standard reward icon placeholder 07. Placeholder; does not define mechanics.
Standard reward icon placeholder 08. Placeholder; does not define mechanics.
Standard reward icon placeholder 09. Placeholder; does not define mechanics.
Standard reward icon placeholder 10. Placeholder; does not define mechanics.
Standard reward icon placeholder 11. Placeholder; does not define mechanics.
Standard reward icon placeholder 12. Placeholder; does not define mechanics.
Cursed deal card/popup frame. UI Image; cursed deal name/effect added via Unity text.
Icon for Fanatical Credit cursed deal. Icon only; +1 Attack and -1 Max HP text must be Unity UI.
Victory emblem after boss defeat. UI Image; victory text added in Unity.
Defeat emblem. UI Image; defeat text added in Unity.
Game over panel background decoration. Sliced or full UI Image; all summary text is Unity UI.
Decorative frame for run summary stats. UI Image; numbers/labels added in Unity.
First meta unlock icon: Broken Seal. UI Image; unlock name/effect text in Unity.
Meta unlock panel decoration. UI Image; no unlock copy baked in.
Simple arena floor/background for five combat rooms. SpriteRenderer background; can be scaled, avoid busy detail under enemies.
Corrupted village background prop. SpriteRenderer; sign must remain unreadable/blank.
Non-interactive altar slot-machine prop for arena dressing if needed. Decorative only; not the reward machine interaction.
Casino-religious decorative candles. SpriteRenderer prop; keep low visual noise.
Decorative banner without readable symbols. Decorative prop; no readable prayers or signage.
Generic hit impact sprite. SpriteRenderer VFX; Coder can scale/fade.
Enemy death puff. SpriteRenderer VFX; not used for P03 explosion.
Possession tether/flash between player and vessel. Can be stretched/rotated by script or used as short flash.
Reward reveal sparkle. UI overlay or SpriteRenderer VFX.
Cursed deal smoke. UI overlay; no readable curse symbols.
P03 Last Breath damaging possession-exit explosion. Only use for P03; default possession exit must not call this VFX.
